# Daily Report — 2026-04-20

## Task Completed
Added input validation for date, datetime, and duration fields across all tool models.
Three reusable validator functions were added to `utils/helpers.py`:
- `validate_servicenow_datetime` — accepts YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS or YYYY-MM-DD
- `validate_servicenow_date` — accepts YYYY-MM-DD only
- `validate_duration_hhmmss` — accepts HH:MM:SS

Pydantic `@field_validator` decorators were applied to 9 model classes across 5 tool files:
- `change_tools.py`: `CreateChangeRequestParams`, `UpdateChangeRequestParams`, `AddChangeTaskParams`
- `project_tools.py`: `CreateProjectParams`, `UpdateProjectParams`
- `time_card_tools.py`: `ListTimeCardsParams`, `CreateTimeCardParams`
- `syslog_tools.py`: `ListSyslogEntriesParams`
- `sctask_tools.py`: `UpdateSCTaskParams`

Descriptive `ValueError` messages bubble up through Pydantic's `ValidationError` so callers receive clear feedback on the expected format.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 527 passed, 4 deselected
- Coverage: 89% overall
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing vulnerabilities in cryptography, mcp, pip, pyjwt, setuptools, wheel dependencies — not introduced by this change.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/helpers.py` — added 3 validator functions + `re` import
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/change_tools.py` — added validators to 3 models
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/project_tools.py` — added validators to 2 models
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/time_card_tools.py` — added validators to 2 models
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/syslog_tools.py` — added validator to 1 model
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/sctask_tools.py` — added validator to 1 model
- `tests/test_date_validation.py` — 42 new tests covering all validators and model integrations
